reference: I was in prison a while back, and they said I had Hepatitis B. I have never had sexual intercourse, and when I was there, the doctor told me that when I went back to see him, all my tests were good. I don't know if he was responding to Hepatitis B, but I was having stomach problems and burning in my stomach. Is that a symptom, or am I overreacting?
